betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Gregtech ore veins generate thousands of ores in a roughly 4 square chunk area. Instead of mining a couple hundred vanilla iron veins, you'll likely 
want to mine a single magnetite or limonite vein for an equivlent amount of iron. 

Keep in mind that there are over a hundred ore types, each representing a new mineral or element. Right now, the vast majority of these ores will be 
useless to you, so use your prospector to find the veins you really want. 

Gregtech also has some advanced ore-processing, which you don't need to get into at this point. If you're really desperate to increase yeild, you can make a couple of steam grinders and manually wash the impure dust they produce by throwing stacks of it into a cauldron.
